title: Lab: Repair a Heat-Risk Legend
summary: Lab: Repair a Heat-Risk Legend retrieves prior skills in an original unfamiliar color-only risk and gradient contrast incident scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css color formats, css color relationships, css color contrast, css color not only, css gradients in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real unfamiliar color-only risk and gradient contrast incident artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey color and status work here. -->

options.text: Unfamiliar color-only risk and gradient contrast incident case 1: use eight-digit hex whenever contrast is weak because alpha automatically darkens text.

Unfamiliar color-only risk and gradient contrast incident case 1: convert equivalent values, choose a format that makes the intended manipulation clear, and calculate or inspect alpha against the actual background stack.
Unfamiliar color-only risk and gradient contrast incident case 1: assume fifty-percent transparent black always displays as the same gray on every surface.
